title: 毎日王冠の後に・切れねえ啖呵

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One manages to win the Mainichi Okan.
However, the sheer intensity emanating from
Oguri Cap makes her quake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she overhears the fans talking and
realizes her performance wasn't enough to prove
the might of the Oi racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal race, the autumn Tenno Sho, is
right around the corner, but Inari One is
becoming increasingly anxious that she might not
make it as Umamusume of the Year.
